DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Samuel Ray, 415.554.3868 for Plaintiff/Moving party City and County of San Francisco.
Gregory Garver, 415.968.6065 Defendant/Opposing party on his own behalf.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address in good faith all issues raised by demurrer. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
